title: Add all properties of an ingredient as a column in the IngredientsTable
Centralize IngredientDetailDialog form state
description: Replace local useState calls with the shared form controller and simplify the component.

title: Derive PAC and other computed values via form
description: Expose PAC and similar derived values from the form hook so the dialog reuses them.

title: Streamline IngredientDetailDialog sections
description: Render grouped sections via reusable field config/components and ensure open/reset flows run through the form controller.

title: In the dropdown to filter select the columns in the IngredientsTable can you make it the human friendly name

When you click on an ingredient and the IngredientDetailModel appears, can you make the values editable? When edited it should update the ingredient in the database. Initially just make the name of the ingredient editable

Can you create a new page where we can edit suppliers? We should add tabs to the application one for ingredients and one for suppliers. Suppliers should list in a table and should edit in the same way by opening a dialog when you click them

When opening an ingredient make all the fields editable. There are some rules that need to be ofllowed: Category, Type, Status, Brand  needs to be Select as they're enums, Supplier name needs to be a dropdown that uses the supplier name but updates the supplier
Allow editing of nutritional information
description: Allow the editing of the nutritional information as part of the IngredientsDetailDialog. All fields should be editable with the exception of Total

title: Auto calculate PAC and POD
description: The PAC and POD fields should be automatically calculated based on the sugar content of an ingredient. The PAC calculation should be lactose_content*lactose_pac+sucrose_content*sucrose_pac+fructose_content*fructose_pac+dextrose_content*dextrose_pac+glucose_content*glucose_pac+alcohol_content*ethanol_pac+salt_content*salt_pac. The PAC values are lactose_pac = 1, sucrose_pac = 1, fructose_pac = 1.9, dextrose_pac = 1.7, glucose_pac = 1.9, ethanol_pac = 7.4, salt_pac = 100. These fields should be automatically updated when one of the dependent fields changes

title: Refactor IngredientDetailDialog state management
description: Refactor dialog to use centralized form controller and reduce redundant state.

title: Audit useIngredientForm hook for dialog refactor
description: Ensure useIngredientForm exposes state and actions needed for IngredientDetailDialog.
